notes: Section 2878, , as added , , , required reciprocity in use of broadcasting facilities by Communist countries.Pub. L. 93–129, § 9Pub. L. 95–426, title III, § 30792 Stat. 977Oct. 7, 1978

Section 2879, , as added , , , required preparation and submission of report to Congress on alternative plans to relocate activities of RFE/RL, Incorporated to United States territory.Pub. L. 93–129, § 10Pub. L. 96–60, title III, § 30393 Stat. 402Aug. 15, 1979
Section 2880, , as added , , , related to merger of Board for International Broadcasting and RFE/RL Board.Pub. L. 93–129, § 11Pub. L. 97–241, title IV, § 403(a)96 Stat. 296Aug. 24, 1982

Section 2881, , as added , , , authorized use of funds for benefits for certain retirees and surviving spouses of employees of RFE/RL.Pub. L. 93–129, § 12Pub. L. 98–164, title III, § 30497 Stat. 1036Nov. 22, 1983
Section 2882, , as added , , , limited salary of RFE/RL President.Pub. L. 93–129, § 13Pub. L. 98–164, title III, § 305(a)97 Stat. 1037Nov. 22, 1983

Section 2883, , as added , , , authorized use of funds for radio broadcasting to Afghanistan in the Dari and Pashto languages.Pub. L. 93–129, § 14Pub. L. 99–93, title III, § 303(b)99 Stat. 434Aug. 16, 1985
